legalStructure: Legacy TrueFi protocol transitioning to Brila ecosystem; not verified as a registered fund or tokenized fund share.
targetInvestors: DeFi users, protocol participants, TRU holders, and credit-market participants; specific borrower/lender eligibility requires pool-level verification.

metadata.classificationNote: TRU is treated as a protocol/governance token for the TrueFi / Brila ecosystem, not as a direct tokenized credit pool, fund share, or reserve-backed instrument.
metadata.migrationStatus: TrueFi to Brila transition; TRU to BRLA migration referenced in official forum and Brila materials.
metadata.legacyEntityNotes: TFIP-41 references wind-down of the TrueFi Foundation in the British Virgin Islands and formation of Panama-based Brila entities, but exact public registration documents were not verified in this layer update.
metadata.assetModelQuestion: TRU should be tracked as a legacy protocol/governance token. Any live Brila/TrueFi credit vaults should be researched as separate asset records if they represent specific RWA exposures.
institutionalGradeBlockers: No verified prospectus or fund document for TRU.
No verified transfer agent or fund administrator for TRU.
No verified custodian or reserve report for TRU.
Migration to Brila creates issuer/governance continuity risk.

_meta.notes: Use official Brila docs and TrueFi forum proposals as primary sources. Do not classify as institutional-grade until legal entity, governance, audit, and live credit exposure are verified.
